title: GKN notes
snippet: Cost calculation data from GKN session with scenarios A and B, questions about cost communications and tracking, presentation feedback notes, and session observations.

title: GKN Meeting Notes
snippet: Meeting notes from GKN session. Key items to follow up on: Eric to send the indirect cost purchasing policy, switch presenters, and ask GKN finance to provide GKN-specific examples. Open question around whether to use Excel for breakouts.

actions.text: Eric to send indirect cost purchasing policy
Ask GKN finance to provide GKN examples
Change the risk number on the breakout exercise cost estimation activity — 150 vs 220
Too many words per slide on cost control / monitoring etc. — replace with pictures

Noticed difference in departments — ELMO have a lot of systems and processes that other landing gear divisions do not (e.g. BI tool to analyse procurement data). How to get this across the wider business?

title: Tekmar — cash model plan
snippet: Build a cash model for Tekmar. Ramp to 250 days. Remodel at 3 years.

title: 3t — audit notes
snippet: Notes from the 3t audit. Large revenue samples reviewed. Key findings: no delivery notes since Inna started, one-off incorrect posting with duplicate invoice amounts, costs not accrued by business policy, cut-off checklist needed for month end.

title: 3t — revenue recognition
snippet: Revenue recognition example for 3t. Original content was stored as an embedded image in Notion and cannot be recovered as text.

title: Scope — OODA loop project
snippet: Scoping notes for a project using the OODA loop (Observe, Orient, Decide, Act) as a framework for coaching material development. Scope areas include alignment to BTR, recommendations to uplift, timeline for potential material, business governance.

title: Training skills — cross-function notes
snippet: Notes from a cross-function session on training skills frameworks. Quality has 50 skills defined in Workday with 20 generic job profiles. ME covers 30 roles for 30,000 people. People Development has a skills wheel and catalogue.

title: Side hustle — goal & strategy
snippet: Building towards £100k revenue within 3 years (target: April 2029). Strategy covers offer, audience, how to reach them, and supporting content. Potential targets: businesses with no website — Ceylon Cafe, Woolstone Pub, Ace Autoworks.

title: Drone idea — filming & content
snippet: Film city — 2 mins long, 5–6 popular locations. Research via Pinterest and Google. Share on YouTube, link to website. Shoot sunsets, 4-second clips, low ambient/electronic music from Audio Jungle. Include face on clip.

title: Drone business plan — 12-month beginner to pro
snippet: Full 12-month UK drone footage business plan. Covers registration (CAA Operator ID, A2 CofC), portfolio building, stock footage uploads (Shutterstock, Adobe Stock), first client work, and scaling to £500–£1,000/month by end of year.

title: Ebanks Fire Protection — notes & ideas
snippet: Fire risk assessment business. Open questions: FIA third-party certification, BM Trada. Target clients: care homes, HMOs, offices, universities, council property, schools. Ideas: app, business budget, investment, business development.

title: Fire Protection — email scripts
snippet: Outreach email templates for eBanks Fire Protection. Includes general formal and conversational versions, plus sector-specific templates for schools, offices, universities, HMOs, industrial sites, and care homes/hospitality/retail.

title: Courses purchased
snippet: BSL Level 1 & 2, Podcasting, YouTube Masterclass, Music Production, Graphic Design, Excel, Persuasion, English Grammar, Productivity Habits, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, XD, Time Management. Login details for Simpliv and CPD Portal saved.

title: Writing — story ideas
snippet: Consolidated story concepts spanning 2015–2021: future brain hack, robot kids taxi, off-grid society, photographic memory character, code breakers, virus/fortune-cookie shorts. Plus Pixar story structure template and philosophical thoughts.

title: Future brain hack

title: Photography — shot techniques
